governor.name: Olivia Isobel Rodrigo
governor.title: Governor of the State of Minnesota
bio: Olivia Rodrigo is the 41st Governor of the State of Minnesota. A Grammy Award-winning singer-songwriter by early career and a nationally recognized advocate for youth civic engagement, Governor Rodrigo transitioned from the entertainment industry into public service, where she leveraged her platform to champion education, mental health awareness, and generational equity before being elected to the state’s highest office.

Her administration has focused on strengthening Minnesota’s public education system, expanding access to affordable healthcare, investing in climate resilience across the state’s urban and rural communities, modernizing infrastructure, and fostering a culture of civic participation and transparency in government.

Governor Rodrigo resides in Saint Paul with her family. She continues to support arts education initiatives statewide and maintains an active role in philanthropic efforts aimed at empowering young leaders.

hero.headline: A government for every Minnesotan.
hero.lede: From the forested shores of the North Shore to the rolling farmlands of the Red River Valley, the work of state government is to protect our communities, strengthen our economy, and uphold the commitments we share to one another.

footer.address: Office of the Governor · 130 State Capitol · MN 55155
